Added_Other.mechanism: Tracks and optimizes the number of draw calls made during rendering.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves game performance by reducing lag and making graphics smoother.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFileMeshInstanceSupport
Added_Other.mechanism: Adds support for a new type of mesh file format in Roblox.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixCsgColor3

Added_Other.purpose: Improves color accuracy and consistency in game objects.

Added_Other.purpose: Enhances the visual quality of decals, making them look better on objects.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixExtents
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the dimensions of objects to optimize rendering and collision detection.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves game performance and reduces lag by streamlining object interactions.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixFileMeshScale
Added_Other.mechanism: Fixes the scaling issues with file meshes to ensure they display correctly.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that file meshes appear at the intended size, improving the overall game aesthetics.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixInstanceUvOffset
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts how UV offsets are calculated for 3D models.
Added_Other.purpose: Fixes visual issues in 3D models for a better appearance.

Added_Other.mechanism: Optimizes material handling in the game engine.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the appearance and performance of materials in games.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixMeshColor
Added_Other.mechanism: Adjusts the color rendering of mesh objects for better visual consistency.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the appearance of 3D models in games, making them look more vibrant and accurate.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixSpecialFileMeshColor
Added_Other.mechanism: Corrects color issues with special file meshes in the game.
Added_Other.purpose: Ensures that players see the intended colors for special meshes, improving visual consistency.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimFixSpecialMeshScaling
Added_Other.mechanism: Fixes the scaling issues with special mesh objects.
Added_Other.purpose: Improves the appearance of special meshes, making them look better in the game.

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimInvalidatePartiallyStreamedModelInstances

Added_Other.name: FFlagSlimSpecialMeshPlastic
